title: rhus radicans var. pubens
intro: Rhus radicans var. pubens, also known as the smooth American poison ivy, is a perennial woody vine of the Anacardiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include relieving pain and inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting immune function. Smooth American poison ivy can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
